name: frontal lobe region volumes
description: Quantitative assessment of frontal lobe subregions for executive function and behavioral regulation.

attributes.name: frontal lobe volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left frontal lobe, clinically relevant for executive and motor functions.

attributes.name: frontal lobe volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right frontal lobe, clinically relevant for executive and motor functions.

attributes.name: primary motor cortex volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left primary motor cortex, clinically relevant for voluntary movement control.

attributes.name: primary motor cortex volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right primary motor cortex, clinically relevant for voluntary movement control.

attributes.name: superior frontal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left superior frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for attention and working memory.

attributes.name: superior frontal gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right superior frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for attention and working memory.

attributes.name: middle frontal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left middle frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for planning and decision-making.

attributes.name: middle frontal gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right middle frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for planning and decision-making.

attributes.name: inferior frontal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left inferior frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for language and speech production.

attributes.name: inferior frontal gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right inferior frontal gyrus, clinically relevant for language and speech production.

attributes.name: lateral orbitofrontal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left lateral orbitofrontal gyrus, clinically relevant for emotional regulation.

attributes.name: lateral orbitofrontal gyrus volume (right)
attributes.description: Volume of right lateral orbitofrontal gyrus, clinically relevant for emotional regulation.

attributes.name: medial orbitofrontal gyrus volume (left)
attributes.description: Volume of left medial orbitofrontal gyrus, clinically relevant for decision-making and reward processing.
